* {
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
background: #0a0c14;
font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
color: #eef2ff;
}
.wrap {
max-width: 1200px;
margin: 0 auto;
padding: 0 20px;
}
/* Шапка */
header {
background: #0f1119;
padding: 15px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #00ffff33;
position: sticky;
top: 0;
z-index: 100;
}
.nav {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: center;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 15px;
}
.brand {
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 1.5rem;
font-weight: bold;
}
.brand .b { color: #fff; }
.brand .c { color: #00ffff; }
.brand small {
display: block;
font-size: 0.7rem;
color: #888;
}
.links {
display: flex;
gap: 20px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.links a {
color: #ccc;
text-decoration: none;
padding: 5px 10px;
transition: 0.2s;
}
.links a:hover, .links a.active {
color: #00ffff;
border-bottom: 1px solid #00ffff;
}
.nav-cat {
background: #00ffff22;
border-radius: 20px;
border: 1px solid #00ffff;
color: #00ffff !important;
}
/* Секции */
section {
padding: 50px 0;
}
.page-hero {
padding-top: 80px;
padding-bottom: 40px;
}
.kicker {
font-size: 0.8rem;
text-transform: uppercase;
letter-spacing: 3px;
color: #00ffff;
margin-bottom: 15px;
}
h1 {
font-size: 3rem;
margin-bottom: 15px;
}
h1 .g { color: #00ffff; }
h2 {
font-size: 2rem;
margin: 30px 0 20px;
}
h2 .g { color: #00ffff; }
.lead {
font-size: 1.1rem;
color: #bbb;
max-width: 600px;
}
/* Статистика */
.stats {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 40px;
margin: 30px 0;
}
.stat .num {
font-size: 2.5rem;
font-weight: bold;
color: #00ffff;
}
.stat .cap {
color: #aaa;
}
/* Карточки */
.grid-3, .team-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
gap: 25px;
margin: 30px 0;
}
.card {
background: #11161f;
padding: 20px;
border-radius: 16px;
border: 1px solid #2a3647;
transition: 0.2s;
}
.card:hover {
border-color: #00ffff;
}
/* Структура управления */
.org-tree {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 20px;
margin: 30px 0;
}
.tree-node {
background: #11161f;
padding: 15px 20px;
border-radius: 12px;
border-top: 3px solid #00ffff;
min-width: 160px;
text-align: center;
}
/* Видео */
.video-wrap {
margin: 30px 0;
}
video {
width: 100%;
border-radius: 16px;
max-width: 100%;
}
/* Формы */
input, textarea {
width: 100%;
background: #11161f;
border: 1px solid #2a3647;
padding: 12px;
border-radius: 12px;
color: white;
margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.btn {
background: #00ffff22;
border: 1px solid #00ffff;
padding: 10px 25px;
border-radius: 30px;
color: #00ffff;
cursor: pointer;
font-weight: bold;
}
.btn:hover {
background: #00ffff;
color: #0a0c14;
}
/* Контакты 2 колонки */
.contacts-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 30px;
}
footer {
background: #0f1119;
padding: 25px;
text-align: center;
color: #777;
border-top: 1px solid #1e2a3a;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
.contacts-grid {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}
h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
}
